description: A panoramic depiction of the naval Battle of Sinop (1853), viewed from an elevated vantage point overlooking a harbor town. Multiple warships are engaged in combat in the harbor, with massive plumes of white and grey smoke rising from cannon fire and burning vessels. The coastal town with its mosques and buildings is visible at right, partially obscured by smoke. Mountains rise in the background, and the harbor is filled with both Russian and Ottoman ships in various states of engagement.
